forecast-period.text: Clear. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely from the late morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Mostly clear. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Mostly clear. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 11:40am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm near the coast in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Mostly clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. A thunderstorm likely. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 27.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. A thunderstorm likely from the late morning. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Woomera, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding east of Coober Pedy. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower north of Marla in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower north of Oodnadatta, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Oodnadatta in the late afternoon and evening. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain east of Leigh Creek, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with damaging winds, large hail and heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding west of Leigh Creek. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
